title: Gate Maintenance, Upgrades, Metrics, and Capstone · Policy Clinic: Quality Metrics
summary: Operate a reusable repository template without letting gates rot or overwhelm contributors. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates quality metrics increment in a reusable quality-gated repository template. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure defect escape, false positives, duration, flakiness, suppression age, and developer friction.
Connect stable named checks to branch protection and define cancellation and rerun policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Quality Metrics, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Build Quality Metrics evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-quality-metrics-1h30cx: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Quality Metrics into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-quality-metrics-1h30cx:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

steps.title: Defend the Quality Metrics model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Quality Metrics applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Measure defect escape, false positives, duration, flakiness, suppression age, and developer friction.
